The Rashmi calculation Is as follows : from the planets· longitude
the debiit:ation points are to be deducted. It is to be deducted from 12
if the planet is posited more than six Rasis {18~ ~ay and if the planet
iS posited within six Rasi$. the same amsas are to be retained. Further
the amsas are to be made into Kalas (minutes) and divided by 1800;
the remainder is the planet's Rashmis. From these Rashmis, 12 is to be
deducted if the planet is posited in an inimical sig.n; for neecha sign and
combust planets, 16 is to be deducted. But if Mercury and Venus are
combust. no deduction is to be made. For retrog.rade planets Rashmis
ate to be doubled and for acceleration one-eighth is to be deduced : •
